products.name: Autoclave Horizontal Cylindrical Triple Wall
descriptionLines: The sterilizer is based on the principle that microbiological action of saturated steam at elevated temperature is rapid and through. All models work on principle of downward displacement of air which is most economical method of obtainig sterilization.

Triple Walled with Steam Storage, Inner Chamber, Outer Wall,Lid and Ring are made of S.S 304 Grade material. with Leak proof argon welding. Autoclave is mounted on Stainless steel frame with ground leveling screwed flanges. Equiped with The Pressure Control Device , Digital Temperature Controller with Digital Timer & Alarm Low Water Cut Off Device, Multiport Valve etc. is incorporated. Operating Temp & Pressure:- Sterilizing Temp: 121° to 131° C, Sterilizing Pressure: 1.2 to 1.5 Kg/cm2 [15 PSI to 20 PSI] , Power: Suitable to Operate on 440 V, 3Ph,50 Hz, AC Supply. Optional features on extra cost: 1] Fully automatic sterilization cycle having feature of auto purge and axhaust installed with three solenoid valves. 2] Vacuum pump.
products.summary: The sterilizer is based on the principle that microbiological action of saturated steam at elevated temperature is rapid and through. All models work on principle of downward displacement of air which is most economical method of obtainig sterilization.

products.name: Table Top Autoclave Front Loading (b Class) With Vacuum And Dry
products.normalizedName: table top autoclave front loading b class with vacuum and dry
nameAliases: table top autoclave front loading b class with vacuum and dry
descriptionLines: Lower Heater power required and upto 30%-50% power saving over traditional autoclaves.
Vacuum pump fitted inside the autoclave to allow pre & Post sterilization vacuum cycle inside the chamber as per the International standards.
Total of 6 Vacuum Cycles with 16 MIN STERILIZATION 16 MIN DRY CYCLE.
With Digital Display of all the operations is sequence and Timer & Temperature.
The Front control panel is made of heat resistance plastic and the top cover is made of stainless steel.
Sealing Ring Made of Silicon Rubber.
Autoclave is fully automatic front loading autoclave with Vacuum & Dry Cycle.
All The Operations goes automatically with single touching of start button.
products.summary: Lower Heater power required and upto 30%-50% power saving over traditional autoclaves.
